faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HanPortrait

q1.question: What is HanPortrait?
q1.answer: HanPortrait is an AI-powered platform that transforms your photos into stunning traditional Chinese Hanfu portraits. Upload a photo, and our AI will dress you in authentic hanfu styles from various Chinese dynasties.

q2.question: How does the AI generation work?
q2.answer: Our AI models are specifically trained on traditional Chinese hanfu aesthetics. When you upload a photo, the AI analyzes your facial features and generates a new portrait that preserves your likeness while dressing you in historically-inspired hanfu attire.

q3.question: Is my photo data safe?
q3.answer: Yes, absolutely. Your privacy is our priority. Uploaded photos are processed securely and are not shared with third parties. You can delete your data at any time from your account settings.

q4.question: How long does it take to generate a portrait?
q4.answer: Most portraits are generated in under 2 minutes. During peak times, it may take slightly longer, but you'll receive a notification when your portrait is ready.

q5.question: What styles of hanfu are available?
q5.answer: We offer styles from the four major dynasties: Han, Tang, Song, and Ming. Each style reflects the authentic aesthetics, colors, and silhouettes of its era, with new styles being added regularly.

q6.question: Can I use the portraits commercially?
q6.answer: Commercial usage rights are included with our Pro plan. For Free and Starter plans, generated portraits are for personal use only. Please refer to our Terms of Service for details.
